models.label: SD 1.5 Baseline
models.intendedUse: Compatibility baseline for Automatic1111 Deforum and fast iteration.
models.expectedStrength: Most likely to work with classic Deforum workflows and lower VRAM pressure.
models.risk: Lower detail and prompt adherence than SDXL-class models.

models.label: SDXL Base 1.0
models.intendedUse: Neutral high-detail fallback for panoramic image-to-image morph tests.
models.expectedStrength: Better detail, composition, and prompt adherence than SD 1.5.
models.risk: Slower than SD 1.5 and may need SDXL-compatible backend settings.

models.label: RealVisXL V5.0
models.intendedUse: Photoreal reference pass for skyline, architecture, and atmosphere.
models.risk: May pull the look away from the desired poetic painterly treatment.

models.label: Juggernaut XL v9
models.intendedUse: Cinematic architecture and atmosphere comparison pass.
models.expectedStrength: High-impact cinematic lighting and architectural render quality.
models.risk: Model card includes business/API-use restrictions; production use needs licence review.

models.label: SDXL Refiner 1.0
models.intendedUse: Optional finishing/refinement pass after an SDXL base render.
models.expectedStrength: Final denoising and detail refinement for selected stills or short candidate passes.
models.risk: Not a primary Deforum animation model; use only where the backend supports refiner workflows.

comparisonRubric: fit with poetic Future Wall art direction
